title: 白宫反对Anthropic扩大Mythos模型用户群体的计划
content: White House officials oppose Anthropic’s plan to broaden the use of its Mythos model. Mythos is capable of launching cyberattacks and creating widespread network disruptions. Anthropic has proposed adding approximately 70 more companies and organizations to its user base.

title: 阿联酋退出欧佩克
content: The United Arab Emirates has announced its decision to leave the Organization of the Petroleum Exporting Countries (OPEC). This move marks a significant shift in the country’s approach to global oil policy, following years of participation in the industry’s governing forum. The withdrawal signals a potential re‑evaluation of its oil strategy and its role within international energy markets.

title: Anthropic Claude Code 大幅涨价：从预估每日 6 美元翻倍至 13 美元
content: Anthropic 近期悄悄将 Claude Code 的 token 成本翻倍，此前每个开发者每个活跃日成本约 6 美元，现约为 13 美元。Claude Code 是基于 token 消耗量计费的 AI 编程助手，这一成本调整反映 AI 使用成本全面上升趋势。上周，Anthropic 曾因定价页面调整引发用户不满，后称是针对 2% 新用户的测试调整。其增长负责人承认现有订阅计划不适应目前使用强度。此外还提及相关阅读内容。 Anthropic Claude Code 大幅涨价：从预估每日 6 美元翻倍至 13 美元 前天 Anthropic 近期悄悄将 Claude Code 的 token 成本翻倍，此前每个开发者每个活跃日成本约 6 美元，现约为 13 美元。Claude Code 是基于 token 消耗量计费的 AI 编程助手，这一成本调整反映 AI 使用成本全面上升趋势。上周，Anthropic 曾因定价页面调整引发用户不满，后称是针对 2% 新用户的测试调整。其增长负责人承认现有订阅计划不适应目前使用强度。此外还提及相关阅读内容。 Anthropic 悄然上调 Claude Code 的 Tokens 使用成本预估 涨幅超 100% 财联社 / 格隆汇 Anthropic 悄然上调 Claude Code 资费：开发者每日成本翻倍 aibase Anthropic Claude Code 大幅涨价：从预估每日 6 美元翻倍至 13 美元 IT 之家 / 凤凰科技 2026-04-29 Anthropic Claude Code 大幅涨价：从预估每日 6 美元翻倍至 13 美元 2026-04-15 算力紧缺之下，Anthropic 调整定价模式：按企业 AI 使用量计费 专业版功能 登录 体验专业版特色功能，拓展更丰富、更全面的相关内容。 行业标签
eventKey: anthropic-claude-code-大幅涨价-从预估每日-美元翻倍至
normalizedTitle: anthropic claude code 大幅涨价 从预估每日 6 美元翻倍至 13 美元
scoreReasoning: 核心AI产品大幅涨价，影响开发者工具成本与采纳，是重要的市场与产品信号。
summary: Anthropic has doubled the daily cost of its Claude Code AI programming assistant, raising the estimated expense from about $6 to $13 per active developer per day. The pricing, based on token usage, reflects a broader increase in AI service costs. A recent adjustment to the pricing page drew user complaints, which Anthropic said was a test for a small percentage of new users. The company’s growth head noted current subscription plans no longer match current usage levels.

summary: Elon Musk and Sam Altman, once allies, now face a legal showdown over their long‑standing feud. The dispute, rooted in high‑profile disagreements within the tech and AI sectors, highlights clashes over leadership, strategy, and influence. Their conflict has escalated to court, underscoring the intense personal and professional rivalry that has developed between the two prominent figures.

LWiAI Podcast #242 - ChatGPT Images 2.0, Qwen 3.6 Max, Kimi-K2.6 ChatGPT’s new Images 2.0 model is surprisingly good at generating text , Alibaba Drops Qwen 3.6 Max Preview , SpaceX is working with Cursor Last Week in AI Apr 30, 2026 8 3 Share Transcript Note from Andrey: I know there haven’t been posts on Substack in the past couple of weeks… Starting this week they’ll resume at a regular cadence, as usual I apologize for the inconsistency. Our 242nd episode with a summary and discussion of last week’s big AI news! Hosted by Andrey Kurenkov and Jeremie Harris Feel free to email us your questions and feedback at andreyvkurenkov@gmail.com and/or hello@gladstone.ai OpenAI released a new ChatGPT image model that excels at accurate text and screenshot-like generations, suggesting a transformer-style approach aligned with agentic “computer use” ambitions.
source: Last Week in AI - Last Week in AI

scoreReasoning: 播客内容，但汇总多款最新AI模型发布与能力变化，信息密度高，对跟踪AI产品形态演进有直接判断价值。
summary: In episode 242 of the LWiAI podcast, hosts Andrey Kurenkov and Jeremie Harris review recent AI developments. OpenAI unveiled ChatGPT Images 2.0, capable of accurate text and screenshot reproductions. Alibaba accelerated its Qwen 3.6 Max to API-only use, while Moonshot AI (Kimi K2.6) and Minimax (M 2.7) released strong open‑source models. Google launched Deep Research agents and added Gemini 3.1 Pro; Mozilla used Claude to fix 271 Firefox bugs. Business news included SpaceX–Cursor deal, Cerebras IPO filing, and Anthropic’s $5 B Amazon investment. The episode also covers synthetic media regulation and various policy updates.

title: Workday’s Last Workday? AI and the Future of Enterprise Software
content: Elena Burger interviews Joe Schmidt about how AI will reshape enterprise software, using Workday as an example. They argue that many current SaaS systems feel broken, that platform shifts can overturn entire categories, and that AI-native agents could radically change workflow, permission, and system management. The discussion highlights limits of legacy SaaS, questions over touted AI‑revenue, and the vulnerability of even defensible software businesses to replatforming.
source: The a16z Show - content+a16zpodcast@a16z.com (Elena Burger, Joe Schmidt)

summary: Elena Burger interviews Joe Schmidt about how AI will reshape enterprise software, using Workday as an example. They argue that many current SaaS systems feel broken, that platform shifts can overturn entire categories, and that AI-native agents could radically change workflow, permission, and system management. The discussion highlights limits of legacy SaaS, questions over touted AI‑revenue, and the vulnerability of even defensible software businesses to replatforming.

title: 荷兰政府推出开源代码平台 code.overheid.nl，底层采用 Forgej
content: 荷兰政府于 2026 年 4 月 27 日正式上线 code.overheid.nl 平台，这是一个面向政府机构的全国性开源代码托管与协作开发平台，标志着荷兰在数字主权领域迈出了重要一步。 该平台完全自主托管，旨在让政府组织能够独立地开发、共享和发布开源软件…

title: HappyHorse没有惊喜
content: 单是便宜，无法被选择。 作者 | 兰杰 编辑 | 乔芊 4月27日，预热已久的HappyHorse终于开启测试，颇为遗憾的是，它没能像横空出世的Seedance2.0那样掀起巨浪。没有惊喜，对于HappyHorse来讲是一个颇为中肯的评价。 HappyHorse是阿里巴巴ATH事业群旗下创新事业部研发的视频模型，于4月27日开启灰测，并接入千问App。 该视频模型饱受关注的原因有二。 一是因为在开放测试前，HappyHorse在未标注厂商的情况下，登顶了以盲测为主要形式的权威AI评测平台Artificial Analysis AI Video Arena排行榜，以更高的Elo分数（通过比赛输赢和对手强弱来动态计算实力排名的数字），力压字节跳动旗下Seedance 2.0、快手旗下可灵AI、Google Veo 3 Fast等视频模型，一炮而红。 随后关于其出处、能力的热议不断，甚至有数个假官网冒名顶替，吸引了无数不知情的围观群众。 二是因为该视频模型背靠阿里。登顶测评榜后三天，4月10日，阿里ATH创新事业部正式认领。 HappyHorse和其所在的ATH事业群都很年轻，后者是由阿里巴巴CEO吴泳铭于3月成立并亲自挂帅的，整合了通义实验室、MaaS业务线、千问事业部、悟空事业部及AI创新事业部五大板块。在官方的叙事中，ATH创新事业部已启动一个AI时代的全新交互方式探索计划，HappyHorse是这个探索方向的一部分，更多的产品会陆续推出。 据接近阿里人士表示，今年3月ATH事业部成立之后，阿里定下了AI业务日均消耗达到百万级的目标，为了弥补自身在多模态大模型上的短板，也为了推动Token的消耗，阿里加速了视频生成大模型的落地，HappyHorse就是这一策略下的产物。 在Seedance2.0一家独大、定价颇高，且排队不断的情况下，行业也十分期待能有一个新的、能力与Seedance2.0相当的视频模型出现。只是当测试开放之后，不少从业者表示了失望。此前在马年春节期间，即梦App的图标将原本的陀螺形象改成了一匹小马，如今也被媒体颇有意味地解读为“拿捏小马”。 图片来源：官方页面截图 没有技术上的飞跃，就只剩追赶 HappyHorse的技术能力究竟如何？ 内容科技公司三生清影自研的工具Glowave已经接入了HappyHorse，在深入体验了该大模型之后，创始人姜奕祺对该模型的评价是，表现不错，但略逊于Seedance2.0。 姜奕祺毕业于清华大学计算机视觉专业，曾在阿里达摩院任职，对视频大模型了解颇深。他向36氪表示，相较于Seedance2.0，HappyHorse的影视感与提示词还原上有所不足。具体来讲，前者指的是更接近传统专业影视表现的效果，包括画面的精细度、背景的丰富度等。后者可以简单粗暴的理解为，听懂人话的能力。 36氪也测评了Seedance2.0、可灵3.0和HappyHorse三款产品，用同样的提示词、清晰度生成了同样时长的视频。在观看了可灵3.0和HappyHorse生成的两段视频后，姜奕祺认为后者审美有些逊色，但在关键词的还原，以及物理真实性上更胜一筹，“如果给这两个视频打分的话，我会给可灵3.0的打8分，给HappyHorse打9分” 他进一步说明，“HappyHorse1.0毕竟是1.0，这个起步已经很好了，可灵3.0近期表现下降，可能是将算力用在憋大招上了。” Seedance2.0的测评视频未能成功生成，截至发稿，36氪仍需排队十小时。 总的来说，HappyHorse更多是在市面上已有的视频模型能力的基础上缝缝补补，未能有质的突破。 事实上，HappyHorse的硬实力并不差——150亿的参数，几乎是Seedance的三倍，支持15秒多镜头叙事、多画幅适配及1080P超分输出。换言之，HappyHorse同样可以做
eventKey: happyhorse没有惊喜
normalizedTitle: happyhorse没有惊喜
scoreReasoning: 来源可信，提供阿里视频模型具体性能与定位，对判断AI竞争格局与商业化程度有实际帮助，但分类为social且非用户最核心AI主题。
summary: HappyHorse, Alibaba’s new 15‑second video model, launched a gray test on April 27 after topping AI video benchmarks. Despite its 15‑billion‑parameter size, it falls short of competitors like Seedance 2.0, offering lower filmic realism and prompt fidelity. The model supports 720p/1080p output at modest rates, but without significant technical or commercial differentiation. In a crowded market demanding rapid innovation, HappyHorse remains a modest, early‑stage entrant.

title: OpenAI 揭秘 GPT 模型频繁提及“哥布林”的幕后原因
content: OpenAI 日前发布了一篇技术博客，深入剖析了其大语言模型从 GPT-5.1 起频繁在回答中使用 "哥布林" "小妖精" 等奇幻生物隐喻的成因。这一现象看似无害，甚至略显俏皮，但随着模型迭代，相关词汇的出现频率持续攀升，最终引起了研究团队的高度重视。 问题的根源指向了…
